verse.es: "Si perdonan, su Padre celestial tambien los perdonara."
verse.en: "For if you forgive other people when they sin against you, your heavenly Father will also forgive you."

es: Día 11. El resentimiento es una herida que insistes en mantener abierta. Cada vez que recuerdas lo que te hicieron, vuelves a sangrar en el mismo lugar. No porque sea justo. Porque es lo único que sabes hacer.
Perdonar no es debilidad. No es darte a ti mismo permiso. No es decir que estuvo bien lo que pasó. Es precisamente lo opuesto: es soltar el derecho a cobrar, es sanarrte completamente de la deuda.

La Escritura de hoy dice: "Si perdonan, su Padre celestial también los perdonará." Observa: el perdón no es generosidad del ofendido. Es promesa del Padre. Mientras mantengas la deuda, eres carcelero de ti mismo.
Hoy pregunta: ?A quién sigo castigando dándome veneno a mí? La boca de quien te hirió hace años no te afecta hoy. Tu resentimiento sí. Eres tú quien perpetúas.
Perdón no es olvido. Es libertad. Comienza hoy a soltar, no por el otro, sino por ti. Por tu cuerpo que puede dejar de estar en guerra. Por tu corazón que merece vivir en paz.
en: Day 11. Resentment is a wound you insist on keeping open. Every time you remember what was done to you, you bleed again in the same place. Not because it is just. Because it is all you know how to do.

Forgiveness is not weakness. It is not giving yourself permission. It is not saying what happened was okay. It is precisely the opposite: it is releasing the right to collect payment, it is healing yourself completely from the debt.

Today's Scripture says: "For if you forgive other people when they sin against you, your heavenly Father will also forgive you." Notice: forgiveness is not generosity from the one offended. It is a promise from the Father. While you hold the debt, you are a jailer of yourself.
Today ask: Whom am I still punishing by poisoning myself? The mouth of whoever hurt you years ago does not affect you today. Your resentment does. You are the one perpetuating it.
Forgiveness is not forgetting. It is freedom. Begin today to release, not for the other, but for you. For your body that can stop being at war. For your heart that deserves to live in peace.

prayer.es: Jesus misericordioso, pongo en Tus manos mi salud fisica, mental y espiritual. Restaura lo que esta herido, fortalece lo que esta debil y guiame por caminos de vida plena. Dame sabiduria para cuidarme, humildad para pedir ayuda y esperanza para no rendirme. Amen.
prayer.en: Merciful Jesus, I place my physical, mental, and spiritual health in Your hands. Restore what is wounded, strengthen what is weak, and guide me on paths of abundant life. Give me wisdom to care for myself, humility to ask for help, and hope to keep going. Amen.

act.es: Hoy haz una accion concreta de cuidado integral: hidratarte mejor, caminar, descansar a tiempo, reducir pantalla, pedir acompanamiento o rezar diez minutos en silencio por tu sanacion.
act.en: Today do one concrete act of integral care: hydrate better, walk, rest on time, reduce screen time, ask for support, or pray ten minutes in silence for your healing.
